title: Letters
drDigitalIntro:
Welcome to the keyboard! Let's meet the keys.
• The letter keys type words, sentences, and messages.
• They work just like a classic typewriter.

playgroundTask.instructions: Give the letter keys a spin! Type the words below — don't worry about capital letters, just the letters and spaces.

drDigitalSuccess: You typed it! Those letter keys are the heart of everything you'll write.
drDigitalHint: Type exactly: hello dr digital — just lowercase letters and spaces, nothing else.
